esqlQuery.esql:
TS metrics-redisreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE redis.connections.rejected IS NOT NULL
// Counter: use INCREASE to get rejections over the time window
| STATS rejected = SUM(INCREASE(redis.connections.rejected))
  BY server.address, server.port
// Alert when any instance rejected at least one connection (maxclients reached)
| WHERE rejected > 0
| SORT rejected DESC
